input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.4.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

F.4.4.3 Calculations of Equivalence that do not reference this section F.4.4 may use the actual 
geometry of the chassis.

final_answer: Calculations of Equivalence that do not reference this section F.4.4 may use the actual geometry of the chassis.
